properties.name: keycloak.token-exchange.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Keycloak server (e.g., http://keycloak:8080)

properties.name: keycloak.token-exchange.client-id
properties.description: Client ID with permission to perform token exchange

properties.name: keycloak.token-exchange.client-secret
properties.description: Client secret for the exchange client

properties.name: keycloak.token-exchange.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the token exchange filter

properties.name: keycloak.token-exchange.realm
properties.description: The realm where the token exchange happens. The incoming subject token (from example-service-realm) is exchanged for a new access token issued by THIS realm (gateway-realm).
